reviews.review_description: Another of my goto apps but needs more!

No disrepect to the designers of this item ..it would not be a smart thing if you do not create more art pieces. This is nothing short of brilliant!!!  You will be doing a disservice to mankind and art lovers worldwide if you do not create more of these ...please please please bring em on !  Thank you so much . Paying for more of these is a no brainer.

developer_response.body:
Hello and thanks for this review! Would you allow us to quote it when presenting Art Plunge? (both on our webpage and elsewhere)
If yes, please drop us an email at artplunge@gmail.com and let us know! You can choose to be anonymous, or we can use your oculus username in case you don't want your real name to be published. (just say so in the email!)

reviews.review_description: Was this real the artist image.?

reviews.review_title: Bring this app to the Quest store!
reviews.review_description:
It is a fantastic experience! I am sure a lot of Quest players would take advantage of it as well!
I can see the effort put to it, but bring a new paint at least every quarter, six months :)
Author has a brilliant idea - more please! :D
I would love to see more art work in the vr.
I really enjoy this app. A different slant on we’ll known artworks..
I think the description is a bit deceptive because there’s only 5 pieces of art.  I’d definitely give this app 5🌟 if they’d increase the amount of art to discover.
Very relaxing!

Talented vision and artistry to recreate the scenes in VR.   They've even expanded what's in the painting - like a glimpse into Leonardo's workshop in the Mona Lisa room!  Very short, but I will revisit this app from time to time.   Bravo and looking forward to more.

reviews.review_title: I have exchanged my vr from go to quest
reviews.review_description: And now I can’t use your app in quest how will you address this can you provide me refund - it still don't work please provide me step by step thing todo
This is a very original and immersive artistic experience.
Excellent, we are just wanting  more paintings to dive into.
I love this, please make more paintings.
Getting inside paintings feels like im dreaming. Would love to see more psintings even at additional cost

reviews.review_title: Amazing and hope to see dozens more
reviews.review_description: I'm an archaeologist and art historian and have witnessed with this app  for the first time the incredible potential for VR. I hope the creators of this app will add dozens more interpretations of paintings and ancient Greek vase paintings!
Wish there was more
This is amazing.  A new and art form that's better than the original art.

There are no words. Wonderful. :-)
Please add Mihály Munkácsy, Christ trilogy (Christ Before Pilate, Ecce Homo!, Golgotha) to your collection.
Absolutely love the visuals here.  Breathtaking.  More, please?
